calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-06-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Donald Drummond, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Lily Dang appears in pro per with interpreter Yong Mei Liu. Respondent, Celina Kan appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Drummond.
This case is heard along with related case 833738.

EXHR (A) Motion to dismiss
EXHA (1) Packet consisting of Introduction, Statement of facts, photos

9:59am
Exhibits are retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Judgment Entered
